summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Cloud Kitchen POS page rebuild and URL redirects. All 12 test cases passed. New page at /cloud-kitchen-pos-system loads correctly with all required sections, SEO metadata, internal links, and properly positioned AI section.

passed: 1. /cloud-kitchen-pos-system loads with correct H1: 'Cloud Kitchen POS Systems for Delivery-Only Restaurants'
2. SEO: meta title contains 'Cloud Kitchen POS System | Best POS for Ghost Kitchens & Delivery Restaurants'

3. Page has all 8 required sections: What Is a Cloud Kitchen, Key Features, Recommended POS Systems, Managing Multiple Delivery Platforms, Automation Tools, Why Choose Merchant Solutions, Cloud Kitchen Technology Solutions, FAQ
5. FAQ section has 5 questions including 2 AI-related ones: 'Can AI take phone orders for my cloud kitchen?' and 'How does AI automation work with cloud kitchen POS systems?'
8. Navigation Industries menu has 'Cloud Kitchens & Ghost Kitchens' link pointing to /cloud-kitchen-pos-system (NOT /industries/cloud-kitchens)
9. Navigation Industries menu does NOT have 'Delivery Only' link
10. Internal links section has all required links: /pos-systems, /clover-pos-system, /voice-ai-business-automation, /qr-code-mobile-ordering, /best-self-ordering-kiosk-for-restaurants
11. Cloud Kitchen Technology Solutions section has links to QR ordering, self-ordering kiosks, voice AI
12. sitemap.xml includes /cloud-kitchen-pos-system and does NOT include old /industries/cloud-kitchens or /industries/delivery-only
13. AI-Powered Automation section is positioned AFTER 'Why Choose Merchant Solutions' section and BEFORE 'Cloud Kitchen Technology Solutions' section

critical_code_review_comments: CloudKitchenPOS.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all major sections
App.js correctly implements Navigate redirects for old URLs
Navigation.jsx properly updated with new Cloud Kitchens link to /cloud-kitchen-pos-system
sitemap.xml correctly updated with new URL and old URLs removed
FAQ schema properly implemented with schema.org markup
seed_data_creation: N/A - Content/SEO website with no database operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloud Kitchen POS page rebuild complete. All tests passed: (1) New page at /cloud-kitchen-pos-system with all required sections and data-testid attributes, (2) Both /industries/cloud-kitchens and /industries/delivery-only redirect to new URL, (3) Navigation updated with correct link, (4) sitemap.xml updated, (5) AI section positioned after Why Choose section, (6) FAQ has 5 questions including 2 AI-related ones.
